prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, a masculine mage in layered blue robes with floating spell tags and a feminine crafter in a rolled-sleeve apron with a brass tool belt; the mage steadies a shield on the workbench while the crafter guides a safe repair tool, cooperative hands, warm forge light, no sparks hitting skin, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous forge shot; after ten seconds the feminine crafter taps the final harmless repair mark on the shield while the masculine mage in blue robes holds it steady, friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, warm wood and iron textures, no text, no watermark.
